name: core
description: Cross-repo personal Claude Code layer: skills (cost-aware delegation with a Sonnet subagent floor, tiered orchestrator-worker fan-out, trunk-based git workflow, tiered deep research), review/search/doc agents, the distinguished-engineer output style, and universal git/secret guard hooks. Owns model tiering and git policy; defers prompt craft, plan execution and skill authoring to the superpowers plugin.
